ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was processed */,
  "transaction_type" INTEGER /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Transfer Fund, Add Fund) */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the transaction */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the transaction */,
  "credit_amount" REAL /* Amount credited in the transaction */,
  "debit_amount" REAL /* Amount debited in the transaction */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "external_reference_id" TEXT /* External reference ID for tracking purposes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information used for the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction was initiated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, agent, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "is_2fa_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction type can be reversed */,
  "default_fee" REAL /* Default fee associated with the transaction type */,
  "allowed_roles" TEXT /* Roles allowed to perform this type of transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role has admin privileges */,
  "default_permissions" TEXT /* Default permissions associated with the role */,
  "can_approve_transactions" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users with this role can approve transactions */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users with this role can manage other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, approve) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information used to perform the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the action was performed */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval request */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction requiring approval */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the approval or rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the approval */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the approval was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information used to approve the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the approval was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_approvals_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_approvals_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information used to make the change */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
